tokens.basis: Largest implementation rung yet — Rapier integration plus per-wheel mechanics. Pre-flight inspection of rapier3d-compat .d.ts files to verify trimesh/raycast/setEnabledRotations APIs, plus one diagnostic round to find the resetForces requirement (Rapier accumulates user forces persistently across world.step calls). At ~10k tokens/% (R0/R1 baseline rate), R4 ≈ 160k. The session was at ~46% used after R3+overlay; R4 likely pushes it to ~62%.

caveats: Same agent wrote and implemented the R4 spec; not a clean cross-tool comparison.

Spec said to attach a cuboid Rapier collider to the chassis; implementation skipped the collider and used setAdditionalMassProperties directly. Rationale: a cuboid colliding with the trimesh terrain would generate contact responses that fight our manual Y management. Documented in code.
